description: Edge cases and error conditions observed from live app

cases.name: Add to cart without selecting a size

steps.action: Click 'Add to Cart' WITHOUT selecting a size

cases.expectedResult: Size heading changes from 'Select Size' to 'Select Size — required'

cases.name: Decrement cart quantity to zero removes item

steps.action: Navigate to /cart with item at qty 1

cases.expectedResult: Item row is removed from cart, cart counter decrements

cases.name: Checkout button disabled on empty cart
Guest/unauthenticated cart access
cases.expectedResult: No checkout button; shows 'Sign in to proceed with checkout' + 'Sign Up / Login' button
cases.signInPromptLocator: getByText('Sign in to proceed with checkout')

cases.name: Login with invalid credentials
cases.expectedResult: Error message: 'Invalid email or password.' — stays on /login

cases.name: Remove item via Remove icon
cases.expectedResult: Item row removed, cart counter decrements, totals update

knownBug.description: Same product with different sizes may not appear as separate cart entries
